name: babylonjs-skill
description: A Codex plugin for Babylon.js 9.12.0 code generation, debugging, migration, and optimization in web apps.

interface.longDescription: Build, debug, optimize, and migrate Babylon.js 9.12.0 scenes in web applications, with guidance for imports, loaders, assets, framework lifecycle cleanup, WebXR, physics, and Three.js migration.
defaultPrompt: Use Babylon.js Skill to build a web app scene.
Use Babylon.js Skill to debug this loader error.
Use Babylon.js Skill to migrate this Three.js code.
